basics.name: 赵官豪 (Guanhao Zhao)
basics.summary: 中国科学技术大学博士生，研究兴趣包括强化学习、模仿学习、扩散模型、智能体能力建模与评估、多智能体协作 / Ph.D. student at USTC, focusing on reinforcement learning, imitation learning, diffusion models, agent capability modeling and evaluation, and multi-agent collaboration.
